item.title: GitHub Unwrapped 2023
item.description: Created on GitHub Unwrapped, you can find anything related there. Result Summary Top language: C++ Javascript Python Issues: Opened: 1. Closed: 1. Others Contributions: 463. Most productive day: Thursday. Most productive hour: 1pm. Pull requests merged: 7. Repository Stared: 111. Many happened this year: my coding skills improved, I have remade some basic front-end websites, etc.. Kind of a successful year for me I guess. Anyways, Happy New Year 2024!

item.title: Reimu
item.description: Yes, this is a shitpost (I have lost my mind after the final exams of the 12th grade first semester). About the gif below, I used media-to-ascii to convert the original to ascii video. ⚠ Attention: I do not own any of these media, these were I found around the Internet. Me during the exams: Reimu dancing Reimu hugging Reimu in the Winter Reimu eating Reimu wishing you a nice day!

item.title: Website's History
item.description: 1.0: Release date: June 2023. This is the first version of my website, when I started to learn front-end development. I glad it worked when I saw it appeared on my phone. Go to page 2.0 & 3.0: Release date: July 2023. As a beginner, I wanted to practice more with more complexity, so I made 2.0 and 3.0. Struggled while trying to make it responsive on other devices. Go to page 4.

item.title: How to install Oh My Posh on Windows
item.description: About Oh My Posh Oh My Posh is a prompt theme engine for any shell, makes your terminal looks better than its default interface. For example: Installation Oh My Posh: To download ohmyposh.exe and all the themes, open a powershell window and run: winget install JanDeDobbeleer.OhMyPosh -s winget Font: After that, you will need a suitable font. I recommend you should use Fire Code font. Setting up Font: You can change the font on the terminal by doing:

item.title: My PC's Configuration
item.description: Faster Windows: Tweak Windows: Winaero Tweaker. Remove bloatware: Bloatbox. Editor: Visual Studio Code with Theme: One Dark Pro. Extensions: Competitive Programming Helper, CodeSnap, Better Comments. Apps: Crystal Disk Info: A SSD/HDD utility software. Everything: Better files/folders search. Notepad++: Extra text editor. K-Lite Codec: Media player. Oh My Posh: Customize Windows terminal, you can read my note on how to install Oh My Posh here. PowerTunnel: An extensible proxy server. Osu skin: Shiro Seijo

item.title: Repositories
item.description: All my projects are uploaded into GitHub. You can check them all out here. ASCII A front-end ASCII table. Calculator A front-end calculator. Code Snippets My code snippets to make coding easier & faster. caodoc.github.io Source code of the current page you are visiting. CIANS Stands for C++ In A Nutshell, a place to keep my code of solved problems on Codeforces, LeetCode, VNOJ, etc. Clock A front-end clock.

item.title: Site Informations
item.description: Avatar by 千道センリ on pixiv. Hosting on GitHub. Static site generator: hugo. Template: risotto (modified). Theme color: catppuccin (mocha). Domain by: is-a.dev. Source code available at caodoc/caodoc.github.io.

item.title: Stuff
item.description: Easy access to some of my front-end projects. Weather forecast Submit ⚠ Warning: Result: Current: Temperature: Wind Speed: Description: Daily: Temperature: Min: - Max: Sunrise: Sunset: Max Wind Speed: Timezone:
